name: Kensei
description: A class that relies solely on his sword

skills.name: Sword's Path
skills.description: Do not deal damage on hit. Instead charge your attack and then deal all damage at once (2s cooldown). Increase damage for 10% with each hit (max 5 stacks)

skills.name: Master's Tempo
skills.description: Every 10/9/8/7/5-th hit hits twice for a total of 125% damage

skills.name: Swordmaster's Instinct
skills.description: Display a skull indicator above an enemy when Sword's Path damage exceeds 120% of their health.

skills.name: Flawless Precision
skills.description: You cannot crit, but *Sword's Path* damage is increased by 1/2/2/3/5% for every 10% of your crit chance.

skills.name: Clean Cut
skills.description: Gain double loot when killing enemy without *Swordmaster's Instinct*
